executive_summary: Broken down enhance-user-profile-page enhancement into 10 concrete implementation tasks based on spec and design contexts. Tasks cover creating EditProfileActivity and layout, enhancing PerfilActivity to show additional fields, updating UserRepository interfaces and implementations, and implementing edit functionality with navigation, loading states, and error handling.

tasks.title: Create EditProfileActivity.java
tasks.description: Create the EditProfileActivity class following the DialogEditarPrecioFragment pattern as specified in the design
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Activity class created with proper imports, extends AppCompatActivity, and includes basic lifecycle methods (onCreate, etc.)

tasks.title: Create activity_edit_profile.xml layout
tasks.description: Create the XML layout for EditProfileActivity with fields for nombre and save/cancel buttons
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Layout file created with EditText for nombre, Button for save, Button for cancel, and proper constraints/styles

tasks.title: Modify PerfilActivity.java to show additional fields
tasks.description: Enhance PerfilActivity to display nombre, fechaCreacion, and rol fields from the user object
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PerfilActivity retrieves and displays nombre, fechaCreacion, and rol fields in the UI

tasks.title: Modify activity_perfil.xml to display additional fields
tasks.description: Update the PerfilActivity layout to include TextViews for nombre, fechaCreacion, and rol fields
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Layout updated with TextViews for nombre, fechaCreacion, and rol positioned appropriately

tasks.title: Update UserRepository.java interface
tasks.description: Add method signatures for updating user profile fields (nombre) to the UserRepository interface
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Interface updated with updateUserNombre(String userId, String nombre) method declaration

tasks.title: Update UserRepositoryImpl.java implementation
tasks.description: Implement the update user profile methods in UserRepositoryImpl using Firestore
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Implementation correctly updates the nombre field in Firestore for a given user ID

tasks.title: Implement navigation from PerfilActivity to EditProfileActivity
tasks.description: Add click listener to edit button/icon in PerfilActivity to launch EditProfileActivity
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Clicking edit button/icon in PerfilActivity launches EditProfileActivity and passes current user data

tasks.title: Implement saving profile name in EditProfileActivity
tasks.description: Add functionality to save the nombre field when save button is clicked, using UserRepository
tasks.acceptance_criteria: When save button is clicked, the nombre value is saved via UserRepository and EditProfileActivity finishes

tasks.title: Implement loading states in EditProfileActivity
tasks.description: Show loading indicator and disable save button during save operation
tasks.acceptance_criteria: During save operation, progress bar is visible and save button is disabled; restored after operation completes

tasks.title: Implement error handling in EditProfileActivity
tasks.description: Show error message and revert field on save failure
tasks.acceptance_criteria: When save operation fails, error message is shown and nombre field reverts to original value
